title: Student — Progress & Settings
content:
Overview


The Progress page tracks the student's performance across self-study courses. The Settings page allows students to manage their profile, password, two-factor authentication, notification preferences, and theme.



Progress Page


The Progress page is divided into two sections displayed side by side:


Course Progress (Left Card):


  • Shows a progress bar for each enrolled self-study course
  • Each bar displays the course name, completion percentage, and a letter grade (e.g., "Physics Grade 11 — 65% • B+")
  • Progress is calculated based on quizzes completed, chapters read, and other activities within the course

Overall Performance (Right Card):


  • Average Grade: Displayed as a large percentage (e.g., 87%)
  • Quizzes Completed: Total count of quizzes taken across all courses
  • Study Hours: Estimated time spent studying on the platform
  • Current Streak: Consecutive days the student has been active
  • Enrolled Courses: Total number of courses the student is enrolled in

Progress data updates automatically as the student completes quizzes and studies materials.



Settings Page — Profile


The Profile section displays:


  • Display Name: Click Edit to change the name shown throughout the portal
  • Email Address: Shows a "Verified" badge — cannot be changed by the student
  • Account Created: The date the account was registered

Editing Profile:


  1. Click Edit next to Display Name
  2. Enter a new name and optionally update avatar initials (2 letters)
  3. Click Save


Settings Page — Security


Password:


  1. Click Change
  2. Enter current password, new password, and confirm
  3. Click Update

Two-Factor Authentication (2FA):


Same three-step process as other portals — scan QR code, verify with a 6-digit code, save backup codes. Students can also disable 2FA by entering their password and authenticator code.



Settings Page — Notifications


Three toggle switches control email and platform notifications:


  • Email Notifications: Course updates and progress reports sent to the student's email
  • Quiz Reminders: Alerts for incomplete quizzes
  • Study Goals: Daily and weekly progress updates

All are enabled by default. Toggle any off to stop receiving that type of notification.



Settings Page — Preferences


Theme: Choose between Light and Dark mode for the portal interface. The change applies immediately.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "Your progress stats update automatically as you complete quizzes and study materials."
  • "The streak counts consecutive days you've been active — keep it going."
  • "You can toggle notifications on or off anytime from Settings."
  • "Dark mode is available in Preferences if you prefer a darker interface."
  • "If your progress seems stuck, try completing another quiz or chapter to trigger an update."
